'''Michael Wainwright''' (born 4 November 1980) is an English former [[rugby league]] footballer who played on the {{rlp|wg}}. He played for [[Hunslet R.L.F.C.|Hunslet Hawks]], [[Dewsbury Rams]], [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], [[Batley Bulldogs]] and spent four seasons with [[Castleford Tigers]].

==Playing career==
Wainwright made his senior debut for [[Hunslet R.L.F.C.|Hunslet Hawks]] after being signed from [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] in 2001.<ref>{{cite news |title=Rugby League: Spending limit scuppers Sailor bid by Wigan |work=The Independent |date=24 January 2001 |page=25}}</ref>
He signed a one-year contract to stay with the [[Castleford Tigers]] for the 2009 season. Wainwright was not in the starting line-up at the start of the 2009 season. Later he was called back into the side due to injuries, and gave some solid performances. He was awarded a new contract for the 2010 season. Wainwright played with Castleford through 2010. He was released by Castleford after over 100 appearances for the club. He later joined [[Dewsbury Rams|Dewsbury]] for the 2011 season.
